overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character holding a lantern while walking through a dense forest during a heavy rainstorm at night. The character discovers an abandoned campsite with a tent and campfire, explores the area, then continues deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with ferns and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense forest holding a lantern to light the way through the rain

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees with thick trunks surrounding the path
thick undergrowth of ferns lining the forest floor
bushes and small plants covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed forest trail at night during heavy rain. The lantern illuminates dense ferns and tall pine trees surrounding the path, with no sky visible through the thick canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned campsite with tent and campfire

events.description: emerges from dense trees into a clearing with a canvas tent and campfire
discovers a dead body lying on the ground near the campfire

agents.ego_description: circling around the campsite examining the tent, campfire, and scattered supplies while avoiding the dead body

notable_agents.action: dead body lying face down on the ground near the campfire

entered.detail: white canvas tent pitched in the clearing
burning campfire with red embers and rising smoke
wooden cart with supplies next to the tent

segments.scene_description: The character discovers an abandoned campsite in a forest clearing, featuring a canvas tent, burning campfire, and scattered supplies. A dead body lies near the fire. The character circles the area examining the scene before moving on.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with large boulders

events.description: leaves the campsite and re-enters the dense forest
navigates around large boulders and rocks on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing through the forest away from the campsite, navigating around rocks and trees

entered.detail: large gray boulders scattered along the forest path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the campsite behind and continues deeper into the forest, navigating a trail lined with large boulders and dense vegetation. The lantern cuts through the darkness and rain as the character walks past tall pines and rocky outcrops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched forest that transitions from a claustrophobic trail to a grim discovery in a clearing before returning to the wilderness. It begins with the character navigating a narrow, enclosed path where a handheld lantern illuminates dense ferns and towering pines beneath a thick, lightless canopy. As the trail opens up, the scene shifts into a forest clearing to reveal an abandoned campsite complete with a canvas tent, a burning campfire, and a dead body lying among scattered supplies. After the character circles the scene to examine the remains, the camera follows them as they leave the camp behind and push deeper into the woods. The environment finally transforms into a rugged terrain of large boulders and rocky outcrops, with the lantern cutting through the heavy rain and darkness among the tall pines.
